Hi Carlos. In one sentence, who are you?
I am Carlos, an analyst at Sucafina. I am from the coffee region of Minas Gerais.
Great. And what is there in your region?
There are many coffee farms, and there is a big warehouse next to the road.
In a meeting, what can you do?
I can share my screen and present the criteria. Could you send me the checklist after the call?
Of course. And what did you do last week?
Last week, I visited a farm, I found one problem, and I submitted the report.

Let me tell you about my work in one minute. My name is Carlos, and I am an analyst at Sucafina. Sucafina is a Swiss coffee company. I am from Virginia, a small town in the coffee region of southern Minas Gerais. Every week, I check documents and I verify certificates. There are many farms in my region, and there is a big warehouse next to the road. In an online meeting, I can share my screen and I can present the audit criteria. Last week, I visited a farm, I found one problem, and I submitted the report. This is my job, and now I can talk about it in English.

Hi Carlos, this is Emma. I want to say congratulations. Ten weeks ago, you said only a few words in English. Now you can introduce yourself, describe your region, run a meeting, and report a farm visit in the past. Could you send me your short text about your work at Sucafina? I want to read it before Block 2. In Block 2, we build longer sentences and we talk about future plans. You did great work. See you soon, and welcome to the next block.

First, Carlos introduces himself: I am an analyst at Sucafina. Then he describes his region: there are many farms near the town. In a meeting, he says: I can present the criteria. He makes a request: could you send me the checklist? Last week, he visited a farm and submitted the report.
